title: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
abstract: 817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents. Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF, and MITRE F3. Follows agentskills.io standard. Compatible with ...
abstract_zh: 伙计们！来试试**Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills**吧！这货简直就是安全小能手，在效率上更是没得说。写周报时，它能帮你快速汇总数据；调Bug时，它比你手动搜索还快半步！关键是它懂网络安全，啥漏洞都能帮咱们揪出来。有这么个神器在手，感觉自己就像升级了一级黑客一样酷炫！
